description_long: This shrub features a collection of sharply angular, elongated leaves that radiate upward and outward from a central base. The leaves are rendered in varying shades of dark green, with some surfaces appearing almost black due to shadowing and the flat, faceted geometry. The overall form is sparse and stylized, with each leaf tapering to a fine point, giving the shrub a modern, abstract appearance. The leaves are arranged in an irregular, somewhat fan-like pattern, with some overlapping and others standing apart. There are no visible flowers, fruits, or stems beyond the main leaf structures. The shrub's minimalist design suggests it would be well-suited for urban landscapes, such as planters or decorative green spaces.
description: A stylized shrub with sharply angular, elongated dark green leaves radiating from a central base. The form is sparse, modern, and abstract, with pointed leaves and no visible flowers.
description_view_0: Three prominent, angular leaves are visible, with the tallest leaf extending sharply to the right and two shorter leaves fanning out to the left.
description_view_1: The shrub appears narrower, with the tallest leaf in the center and two other leaves overlapping behind, creating a denser silhouette.
description_view_2: The tallest leaf extends to the left, while two other leaves are visible on the right, showing more separation between the elements.
description_view_3: The tallest leaf is centered and upright, with two shorter leaves extending outward to either side, giving a symmetrical appearance.
